shelfmark: UTO Sinai CPA NF frag 7, SPP No. 76

layer_record.label: Sinai CPA NF frag 7, Undertext (Christian Palestinian Aramaic)

note: Edited in Müller-Kessler and Sokoloff, pp. 157-160, from photographs in Brock 1995; a number of small improvements can be made

bib.citation: Müller-Kessler, Christa, and Michael Sokoloff. The Christian Palestinian Aramaic New Testament Version from the Early Period: Gospels. A corpus of Christian Palestinian Aramaic. Vol. 2A. Groningen: STYX Publishers, 1998

Müller-Kessler, Christa. “Codex Sinaiticus Rescriptus (CSRG/O/P/S): A Collection of Christian Palestinian Aramaic Manuscripts.” Le Muséon 127 (2014): 263-309. https://dx.doi.org/10.2143/MUS.127.3.3062095
Brock, Sebastian P. Catalogue of Syriac Fragments (New Finds) in the Library of the Monastery of Saint Catherine, Mount Sinai. Mount Sinai Foundation, 1995

cataloguer.message: Description and identification of undertexts as part of SPP (2011-2016). Migrated to SMDL in 2025.

program.label: Sinai Palimpsests Project
program.description: Imaged and studied as part of the Sinai Palimpsests Project (2011–2016), a collaboration between St. Catherine’s Monastery of the Sinai, the Early Manuscripts Electronic Library, and UCLA Library, funded by the Arcadia Fund and the Ahmanson Foundation. The project used multispectral imaging and scholarly analysis to recover and document erased and obscured texts in palimpsest manuscripts from the monastery’s collection.
